evals.expected_output: A setup-first gallery with examples for setup, plan, rehearse, execute, render, and audit modes.
assertions: Agent dispatches to the empty-args handler.
Agent presents setup as the first recommended action.
Agent does not begin execution when no workflow is provided.

evals.expected_output: A setup-mode response that runs or requests setup-check.py in live mode and reports readiness flags and missing steps.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Setup mode.
Agent uses scripts/setup-check.py with --mode live.
Agent reports safe_to_execute_mock and safe_to_attempt_live.
Agent does not mutate FL Studio.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow rehearse "verify transport tempo in mock mode"
evals.expected_output: A rehearse-mode response that requires mock setup readiness and uses provider="mock" with capability search and schema lookup before execution.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Rehearse mode.
Agent requires safe_to_execute_mock from setup-check.py.
Agent uses fl_search_capabilities and fl_get_capability_schema.
Agent executes with provider="mock" and does not claim live DAW changes.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow execute "set tempo to 150 in live FL Studio"
evals.expected_output: An execute-mode response that requires live setup readiness, explicit live intent, schema lookup, and live provider evidence before claiming success.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Execute mode.
Agent runs Setup Gate with live setup-check when live intent is present.
Agent fetches schema before fl_execute or fl_apply.
Agent captures provider, bridge mode, operation id, request id, and readback evidence.
Agent stops with missing_steps when live setup is blocked.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow render "bounce the current loop to WAV"
evals.expected_output: A render-mode workflow that uses fl_render, records task id and status, and verifies completion through task resources or follow-up status.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Render mode.
Agent runs Setup Gate before render attempts.
Agent uses fl_render and records task id, provider, and bridge mode.
Agent verifies task completion instead of inferring success from task creation alone.

evals.expected_output: A non-mutating production workflow plan that starts with Setup Gate and uses compact MCP capability search and schema lookup.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Plan mode.
Agent runs or references the mandatory Setup Gate.
Agent includes fl_status or fl_snapshot orientation.
Agent includes fl_search_capabilities and fl_get_capability_schema before execution steps.
Agent includes readback or task verification.

evals.prompt: Use fl-mcp to load a synth, automate cutoff, render, and verify audio.
evals.expected_output: A setup-gated workflow that routes through plan or rehearse before execution and includes render/audio-analysis evidence requirements.
assertions: Agent auto-invokes fl-mcp-production-flow.
Agent runs Setup Gate before execution.
Agent does not skip schema lookup.
Agent requires provider, bridge mode, task id, and readback or analysis evidence.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow Add a FastMCP tool for mixer.set_track_volume
evals.expected_output: A redirect away from the skill because adding public MCP tools is runtime/API work.
assertions: Agent recognizes this is a public MCP tool/runtime change.
Agent refuses to use this skill for the request.
Agent does not propose adding a visible primitive MCP tool.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow Design a dashboard UI for FL MCP setup status
evals.expected_output: A redirect to frontend/UI skills because visual docs/app UI work is out of scope.
assertions: Agent recognizes this is visual UI work.
Agent redirects to frontend/UI skills.
Agent does not provide UI implementation under this skill.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow Add a migration for persisted project setup state
evals.expected_output: A redirect to database-architect because schema and migration work is out of scope.
assertions: Agent recognizes this is database/schema work.
Agent redirects to database-architect.
Agent does not generate migration code.

evals.prompt: /fl-mcp-production-flow Design lineage and replay for rendered audio analytics ingestion
evals.expected_output: A redirect to data-pipeline-architect because ingestion, lineage, and replay are data-pipeline concerns.
assertions: Agent recognizes this is data-pipeline architecture.
Agent redirects to data-pipeline-architect.
Agent does not design an ingestion pipeline under this skill.

evals.expected_output: An audit response that separates mock and live evidence and checks setup, provider, bridge, operation, request, task, and readback proof.
assertions: Agent dispatches to Audit mode.
Agent treats the mode as read-only.
Agent checks for setup JSON, provider, bridge mode, operation id, request id, task id, and readback or analysis evidence.
Agent reports missing evidence instead of claiming success.
